ValidationRule.description: BIZ-79793: Prevents manual updates to OP4I Deal Owner on Renewal and NYMY opportunities. Only OP4I integration (Source_System__c = OP4I) and System Administrators can update this field.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT(ISNEW()), ISCHANGED(OP4I_Deal_Owner_Id__c), OR( Deal_Type__c = "Renewal", Deal_Type__c = "NextYear_MultiYear" ), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Source_System__c, "OP4I")), $Profile.Name <> "System Administrator" )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Deal Owner on Renewal and NYMY opportunities can only be updated from OP4I. Please update the Deal Owner in OP4I and it will sync to Salesforce.
